title: Fix: Wilcoxon signed-rank p-values are systematically incorrect — normal approximation at n=5 understates all p-values by 17-72% (e.g., 0.033 reported vs 0.0625 exact for SM-1, CS-4, BC-2). Implement exact permutation test for n<=10 in metrics.ts and update all p-values in 7 paper tables. Also fix average ranks for ties and t-critical value (2.262->2.776 for df=4). RC-12 BLOCKING.
